svg.title: Fitness Streaming Analytics Platform — full data flow
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from synthetic data generation through Bronze, Silver, Gold layers, dbt transformation, and final output via DuckDB or Redshift

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the wearable simulator and StreamBus')
g.text: Python StreamBus · 5 event types · 5% bad data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Bronze layer and why is it immutable?')
sendPrompt('What are the 5 reference files used for?')
sendPrompt('How does the quarantine layer work?')
sendPrompt('What transformations happen in the Silver layer?')
g.text: Type-cast · null-handled · joined with reference data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the 5 metrics computed in the Gold layer?')
g.text: Fatigue score · Recovery readiness · Overtraining flag

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DuckDB query the Gold Parquet files locally?')
sendPrompt('Why did we choose Redshift Serverless over provisioned Redshift?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the dbt model lineage — staging to marts')
sendPrompt('What does the coach dashboard mart contain?')
sendPrompt('What will the Streamlit dashboard show?')
g.text: Phase 8 — visual output for coaches and users
